---
title: "🌍 UNICEF Global Insights Report"
author: "Kavya Moturu"
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
    embed-resources: true
    code-fold: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

## 🌱 Introduction

Understanding global challenges affecting children is critical for building a better future.  
This report explores key UNICEF indicators to uncover **patterns, inequalities, and progress** across countries.

---

## 📦 Load Libraries & Data

```{python}
#| label: load-data
#| echo: false

import polars as pl
from plotnine import *

df1 = pl.read_csv("unicef_indicator_1.csv")
df2 = pl.read_csv("unicef_indicator_2.csv")
meta = pl.read_csv("unicef_metadata.csv")

df = df1.drop_nulls()
df = df.filter(pl.col("time_period") >= 2000)
```

---

## 📊 Bar Chart

```{python}
df_bar = df.filter(pl.col("time_period") == df["time_period"].max())

(
    ggplot(df_bar, aes(x="Country", y="Value"))
    + geom_bar(stat="identity", fill="#a8dadc")
    + theme_minimal()
)
```

---

## 📈 Scatterplot with Regression

```{python}
(
    ggplot(df, aes(x="Year", y="Value"))
    + geom_point()
    + geom_smooth(method="lm")
    + theme_minimal()
)
```

---

## 📉 Time Series

```{python}
(
    ggplot(df, aes(x="Year", y="Value", color="Country"))
    + geom_line()
    + theme_minimal()
)
```

---

## 🌍 World Map (Basic)

```{python}
df_map = df.filter(pl.col("time_period") == df["time_period"].max())

(
    ggplot(df_map, aes(fill="Value"))
    + geom_tile(aes(x="Country", y=1))
    + theme_minimal()
)
```

---

## 🚀 Conclusion

This report highlights global disparities and trends using UNICEF data.
